changeSet.author: homebase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE warehouses ( id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, warehouse_code VARCHAR(20), warehouse_name VARCHAR(255), warehouse_type VARCHAR(30) DEFAULT 'FULFILLMENT_CENTER', city VARCHAR(100), state VARCHAR(100), pincode VARCHAR(10), country VARCHAR(2) DEFAULT 'IN', max_capacity_units INT, current_utilization_pct DECIMAL(5,2), is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE, is_returns_center BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE, manager_id VARCHAR(255), version BIGINT DEFAULT 0, created_time TIMESTAMP, last_modified_time TIMESTAMP, created_by VARCHAR(100), last_modified_by VARCHAR(100), tenant VARCHAR(50) )

changeSet.author: homebase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE warehouse_locations ( id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, warehouse_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, location_code VARCHAR(30), zone VARCHAR(10), aisle VARCHAR(10), shelf VARCHAR(10), bin VARCHAR(10), location_type VARCHAR(30) DEFAULT 'PICKABLE', capacity_units INT, current_units INT DEFAULT 0, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE, version BIGINT DEFAULT 0, created_time TIMESTAMP, last_modified_time TIMESTAMP, tenant VARCHAR(50) )

changeSet.author: homebase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE warehouse_inventory ( id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, warehouse_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, location_id VARCHAR(255), product_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, variant_id VARCHAR(255), sku VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, quantity_on_hand INT DEFAULT 0, quantity_reserved INT DEFAULT 0, quantity_available INT DEFAULT 0, quantity_damaged INT DEFAULT 0, quantity_in_transit INT DEFAULT 0, last_counted_at TIMESTAMP, version BIGINT DEFAULT 0, created_time TIMESTAMP, last_modified_time TIMESTAMP, tenant VARCHAR(50) )

changeSet.author: homebase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE products ( id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), brand VARCHAR(255), category_id VARCHAR(255), slug VARCHAR(300), weight_grams INT, state_id VARCHAR(100), flow_id VARCHAR(100), version BIGINT DEFAULT 0, created_time TIMESTAMP, last_modified_time TIMESTAMP, created_by VARCHAR(255), last_modified_by VARCHAR(255), tenant VARCHAR(255) )

changeSet.author: homebase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE inventory_item ( id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, sku VARCHAR(255), product_id VARCHAR(255), variant_id VARCHAR(255), quantity INT DEFAULT 0, available_quantity INT DEFAULT 0, reserved_quantity INT DEFAULT 0, damaged_quantity INT DEFAULT 0, inbound_quantity INT DEFAULT 0, primary_fc VARCHAR(255), low_stock_threshold INT DEFAULT 10, status VARCHAR(50), state_id VARCHAR(100), flow_id VARCHAR(100), supplier_id VARCHAR(255), version BIGINT DEFAULT 0, created_time TIMESTAMP, last_modified_time TIMESTAMP, tenant VARCHAR(255) )

changeSet.author: homebase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE orders ( id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, order_number VARCHAR(255), customer_id VARCHAR(255), total_amount DECIMAL(12,2), currency VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'INR', item_count INT DEFAULT 0, state_id VARCHAR(100), flow_id VARCHAR(100), created_time TIMESTAMP, last_modified_time TIMESTAMP )

changeSet.author: homebase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE user_profiles ( id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, email VARCHAR(255), first_name VARCHAR(255), last_name VARCHAR(255), phone VARCHAR(255), role VARCHAR(255), state_id VARCHAR(100), flow_id VARCHAR(100), tenant VARCHAR(255), created_time TIMESTAMP )

changeSet.author: homebase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE shipments ( id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, order_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, carrier VARCHAR(50), tracking_number VARCHAR(255), shipping_method VARCHAR(20), current_location VARCHAR(255), state_id VARCHAR(100), flow_id VARCHAR(100), created_time TIMESTAMP )

changeSet.author: homebase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE supplier ( id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, business_name VARCHAR(255), name VARCHAR(255), email VARCHAR(255), status VARCHAR(50), state_id VARCHAR(100), flow_id VARCHAR(100), tenant VARCHAR(255), created_time TIMESTAMP )

changeSet.author: homebase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE fulfillment_orders ( id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, order_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, warehouse_id VARCHAR(255), user_id VARCHAR(255), priority VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'STANDARD', fulfillment_type VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER', assigned_picker_id VARCHAR(255), assigned_packer_id VARCHAR(255), pick_started_at TIMESTAMP, pick_completed_at TIMESTAMP, pack_started_at TIMESTAMP, pack_completed_at TIMESTAMP, shipped_at TIMESTAMP, total_items INT DEFAULT 0, total_weight_grams INT, carrier VARCHAR(100), tracking_number VARCHAR(255), shipping_method VARCHAR(50), estimated_ship_date DATE, estimated_delivery_date DATE, notes VARCHAR(2000), state_id VARCHAR(100), flow_id VARCHAR(100), version BIGINT DEFAULT 0, created_time TIMESTAMP, last_modified_time TIMESTAMP, tenant VARCHAR(50) )

changeSet.author: homebase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE fulfillment_line_items ( id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, fulfillment_order_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, order_item_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, product_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, variant_id VARCHAR(255), sku VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, product_name VARCHAR(500), quantity_ordered INT NOT NULL, quantity_allocated INT DEFAULT 0, quantity_picked INT DEFAULT 0, quantity_packed INT DEFAULT 0, quantity_shipped INT DEFAULT 0, quantity_short INT DEFAULT 0, bin_location VARCHAR(50), barcode VARCHAR(100), weight_grams INT, status VARCHAR(30) DEFAULT 'PENDING', version BIGINT DEFAULT 0, created_time TIMESTAMP, last_modified_time TIMESTAMP, tenant VARCHAR(50) )

changeSet.author: homebase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE pick_lists ( id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, fulfillment_order_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, warehouse_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, assigned_to VARCHAR(255), status VARCHAR(30) DEFAULT 'PENDING', item_count INT DEFAULT 0, picked_count INT DEFAULT 0, started_at TIMESTAMP, completed_at TIMESTAMP, notes VARCHAR(1000), version BIGINT DEFAULT 0, created_time TIMESTAMP, last_modified_time TIMESTAMP, tenant VARCHAR(50) )

changeSet.author: homebase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE inventory_movements ( inventory_item_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, type VARCHAR(50), quantity INT, reference_id VARCHAR(255), fulfillment_center_id VARCHAR(255), movement_time TIMESTAMP, reason VARCHAR(255) )

changeSet.author: homebase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE fulfillment_centers ( id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, code VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, city VARCHAR(100), state VARCHAR(100), pincode VARCHAR(10), active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE, capacity INT, version BIGINT DEFAULT 0, created_time TIMESTAMP, last_modified_time TIMESTAMP, tenant VARCHAR(50) )
